name: scientific-critical-thinking
tagline: Analytical framework for critiquing scientific study design, bias, statistics, and evidence quality using GRADE/Cochrane standards.
verdict: Solid, well-organized analytical skill with clear GRADE/Cochrane frameworks, explicit non-triggers, versioning, and transparent disclosure of its optional OpenRouter figure-generation call. Minor gaps: no failure handling for that external step and SKILL.md runs slightly over the line-count guideline. No security concerns found.

highlights.summary: The optional OpenRouter schematic-generation step (line 44, generate_schematic.py) has no guidance for a missing API key or failed call.
SKILL.md is ~560 lines, over the ~500-line guideline (though under the 25KB byte budget).
